subparts.text: Relationship between urban form and Transport patterns

questions.question_text: What are the different elements of urban infrastructure? Briefly discuss the data required for provision and planning of urban networks and services.
What are the principles of resource distribution in a space? Discuss briefly the types and hierarchical distribution of services.
What is the process of supply of water from source to a residential accommodation in an urban area? Also, discuss the best practices to reduce water demand in a building.
Explain the process of planning for Stormwater management in an Urban area? Discuss the best practices in brief.
What are the different types of Municipal Waste? Briefly discuss the planning provisions and management issues related to Municipal waste management in India.
How do we identify vulnerable locations for Fire hazard? Discuss the methods of firefighting and planning provisions for Fire hazards.
Explain the basic principles of transport infrastructure design. Also, briefly discuss the hierarchy, capacity and geometric design elements of roads and intersections.
Explain the urban transport planning process in brief. Also, discuss the environmental and safety issues that must be considered by a planner.
